annotation.technical_notes: A highly minimalist, sparse preset featuring a single custom wave rendered as a thin white line in the center of a black void. The wave reacts to the treble and mid-range frequencies of the test signal with rapid, erratic twitching, while the surrounding screen remains completely dark due to a lack of frame feedback or warp field activity. This represents an extreme reductionist aesthetic with near-zero decay trails.

compatibility.note: capture was empty (157526 bytes); preset doesn't render meaningfully against the current test signal
